title: Senior Doctor - Manipal Hospitals - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Manipal Hospitals - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Manipal Hospitals are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Manipal Hospitals:
Manipal Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Hospitals!
